summary: Implemented context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics in commit c74b42c. The diagnostic now extracts selected item_id values from a saved context-pack manifest and uses them only for read-only context_match reporting against valid L0 summary records. The CLI now supports --context-manifest. Missing, invalid, non-object, and missing-items manifests are handled nonfatally. The implementation preserves selection_effect none and does not change provider prompts, context selection, or automatic L0 retrieval behavior. CAP-0002 evidence hashes were refreshed. L0 diagnostic tests passed with 10 tests, self-model tests passed with 37 tests, full suite passed with 316 tests, and post-commit self-model index audit returned ok true.
